feedback.text: App keeps crashing when I try to checkout. This is unacceptable.
Love the new UI redesign! Everything looks much cleaner now.
Payment failed three times in a row. Had to use a different app to buy what I needed.
The checkout flow is way too slow now. Takes 10+ seconds to load.
Great selection of products, easy to browse.
Getting a 500 error every time I try to pay for orders over $500.
The new smart checkout feature is intuitive when it works.
App froze at the payment screen. Had to force close and lost my cart.
This update broke everything. Can't complete any purchase anymore.
Smooth experience overall. Delivery tracking is excellent.
Why is the app so sluggish after the latest update?
Checkout keeps failing with a cryptic error message. Very frustrating.
The new search filters are amazing. Finding products is so much easier.
My payment went through but I never got a confirmation email.
Tried to buy a laptop costing $750 — instant crash on payment.
Decent app but the latest version has some bugs.
I've used this app for 2 years and this is the worst update yet.
The customer support team was very helpful resolving my issue.
Can't add items to cart anymore. The button seems broken.
Performance has tanked since the update. Everything takes forever.
Love using this app for daily shopping. Works great on my phone.
The app crashes specifically on the payment confirmation step.
Getting timeout errors when trying to checkout with large orders.
Nice app, nothing special but gets the job done.
I want a refund. The app failed to process my payment but charged my card.
The recommendation engine is actually pretty good. Found some great deals.
Uninstalling this garbage. Three crashes in one hour.
Checkout worked fine for small orders under $100 but fails for larger ones.
The loading animations are smooth and the app looks polished.
App is completely unusable right now for purchases. PLEASE FIX.
